our eclipse calculations assume that the Moon is a smooth sphere, with two options for the radius to account for the valleys in the lunar limb.  We could consider using lunar altimeter data (e.g., from LRO) to be more accurate, as is done by modern eclipse software.  See also this just-published paper for further inspiration: [Wright & Young (2024), "A Raster-oriented Method for Creating Eclipse Maps"](https://doi.org/10.3847/1538-3881/ad6b23).","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/issues/7809/reactions","total_count":2,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":1,"rocket":0,"eyes":1},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/issues/7809/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/issues/comments/2408805956","html_url":"https://github.com/sunpy/sunpy/issues/7809#issuecomment-2408805956","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/sunpy/sunpy/issues/7809","id":2408805956,"node_id":"IC_kwDOACEKh86Pk3ZE","user":{"login":"aDNAn-itis","id":183263467,"node_id":"U_kgDOCuxg6w","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/183263467?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis","html_url":"https://github.com/aDNAn-itis","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/aDNAn-itis/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-10-13T03:37:21Z","updated_at":"2024-10-13T03:37:21Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"
